title: QuartoStone Configuration
description: Schema for _quartostone.yml — the workspace configuration file for QuartoStone.

commit_mode.description: Controls when Git commits are made after a save/render cycle. 'auto' commits immediately with a generated message; 'prompt' shows a toast in the UI with the auto-generated slug so the user can confirm or edit; 'manual' never auto-commits.

commit_message_auto.description: Template for auto-generated commit messages. Supported placeholder: {alphanum8} (random 8-character alphanumeric string).

render_on_save.description: Whether to run 'quarto render' automatically whenever a .qmd file is saved.

render_scope.description: Scope of the render triggered on save. 'file' renders only the changed file; 'project' renders the entire Quarto project.

watch_interval_ms.description: Debounce interval in milliseconds for the file watcher. Changes within this window are batched into a single render cycle.

port.description: TCP port the QuartoStone dev server listens on.

pages_dir.description: Directory (relative to workspace root) where .qmd page files live.

open_browser.description: Whether to automatically open the browser when 'quartostone serve' starts.

allow_code_execution.description: When false (default) the POST /api/exec endpoint returns 403. Set to true to enable executing Python/R/Julia code cells. Defaults to false for security — only enable in trusted local environments.

exec_timeout_ms.description: Subprocess execution timeout in milliseconds for POST /api/exec. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds). Primarily useful for tests or long-running notebook cells.
